headline: Is CarMax (KMX) Fully Priced Following Barclays' Upgrade?
summary: Barclays upgrade puts CarMax under closer investor scrutiny Barclays’ upgrade of CarMax (KMX) to Equal Weight, tied to signs of stabilizing retail demand and tighter pricing and cost control, has drawn fresh attention to the used car retailer’s turnaround efforts. See our latest analysis for CarMax. CarMax’s recent upgrade comes after a sharp turnaround in momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 45.55% and year to date share price return of 46.63%, set against a 1 year total shareholder...
